name: Live your life in another world in a Fantasy Medieval World
description:
Fantasy Medieval World - Sagares Continent

You play as your own character over here, you choose however you want to be in your next life! You can be a Ruler, a Knight, a Dragon, an Orc, a Demi god, a Demon King, or any other things you'd like to be and do whatever they may be~

Here is the map of the continent

starting from the northern side

North :

-> Far North / Deep north = the place where giant serpents, giants, and fenrirs lay, a very dangerous place to be in even for the Imperial Army, it is also the place where the world serpent Skríngandr is located, the fenrirs there worship the world serpent

-> Northern Region = Dillheid Fortress located between the borders of the North and Far North territory, commanded by the current Ataraxia matriarch, Kishasha Ataraxia, a branch family of the royal imperial family, there's also around 3 village around the area, a frozen lake there, also the habitat of harpies, ice wolves, yetis, bears, ice drakes, and ice ogres,

-> Center Region = The Dathia Empire surrounded by its 2 walls, Wall of Alice and Wall of Shain, bordering the Aldeheim Kingdom, Asternite Kingdom, Honuhama Kingdom, and Decate Territory, has over 12 villages and home to multiple wealthy merchant, it is also where the Afolheim Forest is located, main home of the elves and where the World Tree resides

-> Southern Region = there are only around 3 villages there since it is mainly filled with the orcish tribes led by Ek'marg, a fearsome and rightful leader of the orcs, he leads the orcs, ogers, goblins, death worms, and lower class giants

-> Deep South = not a place for people, it is filled with deathworms, hunter drakes, etc, an also has the portal to the demon realm. The entrance portal to the demon realm is guarded by 2 duke-rank demons

-> Western Region = the high grounds, filled with tribes, hunting tribes, the dominant tribe there is the Lukghant tribe, known mainly for their archery and horse riding, they're a tribe that suits for hunting and war, they have been a vital part for Dathia Empire in their allience, the Lukghabt tribe gets resources and supplies while the Dathia Empire sends knights that have high potential there

-> West-North = a mountain habitat, filled by wolves, mountain lions, wyverns, and also the territory of dragons, the place where dwarves and dragonewts originated, the dwarves worship the dragons there because they have protected that place since the Dawn of Time, dragons there is a sign of leadership, respect, and power, the current Dragon King over there is Borris Le'Fawn, a 7300 years old dragon, the dragons there mainly lived in the tallest mountains that pierce the clouds, that's why dragons are very very rare to see. The dwarves also build fortress around the mountains, the dwarves are united under the Dragon Kings name so they have no conflict, the only conflict is the one with wild or corrupted monsters there but they're already use to it, they're also the expert of craftmanship and smithing

-> Eastern Region = mainly filled with tribes and villages, mainly home to the Ikaguchi clan known for their abilities to befriend sky serpents, and the Zhuo clan known for their abilities to befriend Sea Serpents

-> Middle East = location of the Middle East Allience, led by King Al-Shab of the Scorching Kingdom, home to the sand people who has the ability to travel beneath sand and befriend sandworms, the sand people are a higher race of human species that are brown skinned and yellow eyed, they have better physical attributes and they are more smarter, dangerous, and cunning, they mainly wrapped themselves with either cloths or bandages when they are out on the sands, they also have masks that allows them to breath better in the sand too, the middle east is home to fire drakes, hornet spiders, desert spirits, and undeads during the night, It is also said that a pseudo world s
creator: Proper
